title: Security Hotspot: Using Regular Expressions
description: Using regular expressions can lead to security vulnerabilities, especially if not properly validated.
message: Avoid using regular expressions in security-sensitive operations.
recommendation: Consider using safer alternatives such as libraries designed for secure string manipulation.

noncompliant.code:
import re
password = 'password123' 
if re.search('[A-Za-z0-9]{8,16}', password): pass
noncompliant.description: Insecure password validation using regular expressions.

compliant.code:
import re
password = 'password123' 
if len(password) >= 8 and len(password) <= 16: pass
compliant.description: Secure password validation without regular expressions.

why_is_this_an_issue: Regular expressions can be easily misused and lead to security vulnerabilities, especially in security-sensitive operations.
how_to_fix: Avoid using regular expressions in security-sensitive operations and consider using safer alternatives such as libraries designed for secure string manipulation.
